title: An Ordinance Amending/supplementing Existing Regulation and Requirement of Closed Circuit Television (CCTV) System in the Municipality of Los Baños, Providing for This Purpose, the Minimum Technical Standard and Specifications As Per Department of the Interior and Local Government DILG) Memorandum Circular No. 2022-060 Dated May 18, 2022. Author: Councilor Benedicto S. Alborida, 8/8/2022)
